Name: Name of the spatial aggregation feature (e.g., reef name, Bioregion number, etc)
Shelf: Shelf habitat within the spatial aggregation (e.g., Inshore, Offshore, All)
Year: Report year for reef condition assessments. This accounts for surveys across summer within financial year cycles

Field.description.Metric: Metric used to calculate the indicator score
Field.description.Reference: Threhsold reference used to calculate the indicator score (i.e., Critial, Baseline)
Field.description.Median: Median of the indicator score value for a given Aggregation, Shelf and Report Year
Field.description.Lower: Lower end of credible intervals with a 90% probability
Field.description.Upper: Upper end of the credible intervals with a 90% probability
Field.description.tn.reef: Total number of reefs assessed within a given Aggregation, Shelf and Report Year
Field.description.n.below: Number of reefs showing indicator score values below a given Refence value and Indicator

Comm.Change.Description: Observed changes in community composition of Hard and Soft corals

Field.description.meanDiff: Mean difference in proportional cover (0-1) for a given taxa in a given Aggregation, Shelf and Year, compared to the historical reference
Field.description.varDiff: Variance of the Difference obeserved in proportional cover
Field.description.k: Number of neightbours used to estimated outliers in community composition

Description: Auto-generated text to assisst in the interpretation of indicator scores
Disclaimer: Additional information relevant to assist in the interpretation of the indicator scores and descriptive text
